# Throwing Spear
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Throwing%20Spear&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Throwing Spear
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = l
| desc = HOW MANY TIME HAVE I CALL MY NAME FOR YOU

| rof = 80
| range = 
| projSpeed = 15
| lifetime = 650
| minDmg = 325
| maxDmg = 325
| fameb = 6
| feedp = 950
| effects = yes
| pierce = yes

| legendary = 1

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is dropped in a white bag after killing Uvuvwevwevwe.|range2 = 8.02}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
